# Scripts

Parent: [Distributed Inference](../README.md)

Operational scripts and automation helpers for the Scripts workflow.

## Key Files

- `aeon_iot_resolver.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `aeon_iot_snatcher.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `aeon_live_sdr.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `aeon_noaa_apt_resolver.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `aeon_pager_resolver.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `backfill-5b-from-logs.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `check-flux-knot-artifacts.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `check-flux-schnell-build-env.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `compare-5b-results.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `mesh_telemetry_bridge.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `monitor-big-llm-probes.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `run-big-llm-probe-containers.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- ...and 7 more source files.

## Subdirectories

- `__pycache__/`
- `preconditioning/`
- `r1/`

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
